title: rubus liburnicus
intro: Rubus liburnicus, also known as the Liburnian raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Dinaric Alps in Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus liburnicus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus liburnicus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
